name: core-tools
description: Core agent tools (write, read, edit, grep, find, pager, explore)

enabled.description: Whether this extension is enabled. Set to false to disable the extension entirely.

readToolLimit.description: Default maximum lines for the read tool

findMaxResults.description: Maximum number of results for the find tool

grepMaxResults.description: Maximum number of results for the grep tool

maxEditInputSize.description: Maximum edit input size in characters (oldString + newString combined)

maxToolOutputLines.description: Maximum number of output lines for tool results
